productDisplayName: Nike Women's Strong Poly Black Track Pant
description: CompositionBlack pants made of Dri-Fit polyester with orange ribs around the waist as a fitting reinforcement, soft waistband with a concealed pocket on the inside, double stitch around the groin for durability and heat transfer swoosh logoFittingSlimWash care Machine wash cold with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry inside-out in shade Cool iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Your training sessions will stay even more peaceful and comfortable with these pants from nike. The soft and wide waistband sits perfectly on your waist without irritating your skin. Engineered with Dri-fit technology, these nike pants will keep you dry and fresh, even after a gruelling session of yoga or aerobics. When you are not at the gym, pair it with a light and bright tee and chill it out.
